security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://tauri.localhost http://tauri.localhost tauri:; connect-src 'self' blob: data: ipc: ipc://localhost http://ipc.localhost https://tauri.localhost http://tauri.localhost tauri: https://github.com https://*.githubusercontent.com https://huggingface.co https://*.huggingface.co https://cdn-lfs.huggingface.co https://cdn-lfs-us-1.huggingface.co https://*.xethub.hf.co https://cas-bridge.xethub.hf.co https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://files.pythonhosted.org https://pypi.org; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; worker-src 'self' blob:; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Transparent locAl Medical Image AnalysiS Tool
bundle.longDescription: Browser-only PWA for running ONNX medical-imaging models on local DICOM/NIfTI/NRRD files, packaged as a desktop application. No upload, no server-side inference, all processing runs on the user's device GPU via WebGPU.
